Tocalculate diluted EPS, we use the formula:
$$\text{Diluted EPS} = \frac{\text{Net income attributable to ordinary shareholders}}{\text{Weighted average diluted ordinary shares outstanding}}$$

Substitute the given values:
- Net income = 48,945 million RMB
- Diluted shares = 19,250 million shares

The millions unit cancels out, so:
$$\text{Diluted EPS} = \frac{48945}{19250} \approx 2.5426$$

Rounded to 2 decimal places, this is 2.54.

\boxed{2.54}
